name: PLIANT THERA.INC.DL-,0001
summary: Pliant Therapeutics, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on discovering and developing novel therapies for fibrotic diseases. They are developing small-molecule therapeutics and their business model revolves around preclinical and clinical development of their drug candidates, with the goal of partnering with larger pharmaceutical companies or commercializing the products themselves. The company is headquartered in South San Francisco, California.
